summary: Iteration 109: Tested PoA Freshness Automation feature. All 19 backend tests passed. GET /api/employees/{id}/poa-freshness endpoint returns correct freshness evaluation with valid_count, expired_count, unclear_count, overall_status. POST override endpoint requires admin auth and validates document existence. Compliance file includes freshness data in address_verification row with 12-month policy. Approval engine includes PoA blocker when documents missing/expired. Frontend displays PoA section with freshness-aware status and blocker text ('Address: need 2 more valid document(s)').

success_rate.frontend: 100% (PoA section displays correctly with freshness-aware status)

context_for_next_testing_agent: PoA Freshness feature fully implemented. Key endpoints: GET /api/employees/{id}/poa-freshness (returns freshness evaluation), POST /api/employees/{id}/poa-freshness/override (admin override). Freshness data included in compliance-file API under sections.proof_of_address.rows[address_verification].freshness. Approval engine at /api/employees/{id}/recruitment-approval-check includes PoA blocker. Frontend surfaceNormalizers.js at line 179 handles freshness display. poa_freshness_engine.py contains core logic with 12-month (365 days) policy and 2 document minimum.

poa_freshness_endpoint.details: GET /api/employees/{id}/poa-freshness returns 200 with overall_status, valid_count, expired_count, unclear_count, is_complete, documents array

poa_freshness_response_structure.details: Response includes all required fields: overall_status (complete/partial/review_needed/incomplete), valid_count, expired_count, unclear_count, required_count (2), is_complete, blockers, documents

poa_freshness_override_endpoint.details: POST /api/employees/{id}/poa-freshness/override requires admin auth, validates employee and document existence, returns 404 for non-existent resources

compliance_file_freshness_integration.details: Compliance file includes freshness data in address_verification row with overall_status, is_complete, valid_count, expired_count, unclear_count, required_count (2), freshness_months (12)

approval_engine_poa_blocker.details: Recruitment approval check includes PoA blocker when documents missing/expired with descriptive reason

freshness_policy_12_months.details: Freshness policy uses 12 months (365 days) as configured in POA_FRESHNESS_MONTHS constant

freshness_minimum_2_documents.details: Required count is 2 documents (NHS standard) as configured in POA_MINIMUM_DOCUMENTS constant

document_freshness_states.details: Documents have valid freshness states: valid, expired, date_unclear, manual_override with correct is_valid flag

freshness_count_consistency.details: Freshness counts match between poa-freshness endpoint and compliance-file endpoint

frontend_poa_section_display.details: PoA section displays with freshness-aware status, shows '2 files required', blocker text shows 'Address: need 2 more valid document(s)'

api_endpoints_verified: GET /api/employees/{id}/compliance-file - includes freshness in address_verification row
